'''Nuri Pravada''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[near-Human]] member of the [[Quetzal Sisters]], a squad of 'femme-fatales' who worked for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. She along with the other Quetzal sisters, [[Zeela Nall]] and [[Sheyne Tyndos]] served with [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Orma Hundeen]] on a mission on [[Elerion]] to recover the [[Holocube/Legends|holocube]] map containing the location of Rebel main bases from [[Nescan Tal'yo]], [[Hermos (droid)|Hermos]], and [[Gogol (owner)|Gogol]].

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|15|Lucky Stars}} {{1st}}
